data.title: Phishing Alert Issued Over Fake Microsoft Teams Website
data.description: According to PANews, Scam Sniffer has issued a phishing alert on the X platform, warning users about a counterfeit Microsoft Teams website distributing malware. The risks associated with this malicious site include data breaches, credential theft, session hijacking, and wallet theft. Users are advised to verify the source before installing any software.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Anticipate Cryptocurrency Legislation by August 2025
data.description:
According to PANews, Kristin Smith, CEO of the Blockchain Association, stated at the 2025 Digital Assets Summit in New York that U.S. lawmakers are expected to pass legislation for stablecoins and cryptocurrency market structure as early as August. Smith's timeline aligns with predictions from Bo Hines, Executive Director of the Presidential Digital Assets Advisory Committee, who expressed on March 18 that comprehensive stablecoin legislation could be seen in the coming months.

During the summit on March 18, U.S. Democratic Representative Ro Khanna voiced his belief that Congress should be able to pass the stablecoin and cryptocurrency market structure bill by 2025. Khanna noted that approximately 70 to 80 Democratic members view stablecoin legislation as crucial for expanding global dollar usage to enhance U.S. influence.

data.title: Czech Bank's Bitcoin Reserve Debate Intensifies Amid Volatility Concerns
data.description:
Czech Central Bank leaders clash over Bitcoin reserves; volatility and legality lead the debate.
source: https://coincu.com/327468-czech-bank-bitcoin-debate

data.title: Planet Morning News
Cryptocurrency Payments in the EU Predominantly Used for Retail and Food
data.description:
According to PANews, a survey by cryptocurrency payment platform Oobit reveals that 70% of cryptocurrency payments in the European Union are directed towards retail, food, and beverage purchases. The report, which calculates all transactions in U.S. dollars, indicates that the average payment amount using the Oobit app is $8.36, while the average deposit amount is approximately $85. Following retail and food expenditures, 26% of payments are allocated to travel-related activities, including accommodation, travel, and aviation. Additionally, 1.5% of payments are used for government services and digital payments, with another 1.5% spent on healthcare and entertainment.

The report suggests that the increase in cryptocurrency payments may be attributed to the EU's growing acceptance of digital assets, bolstered by government-enacted cryptocurrency legislation that enhances their credibility. Notably, 92% of these payments are made using the USDT stablecoin, which faces challenges under the MiCA regulations that came into full effect on December 30, 2024.

Oobit's findings are supported by data from Chainalysis, which shows a 44% year-on-year increase in cryptocurrency adoption in Central, Northern, and Western Europe (CNWE). For transactions under $1 million, the stablecoin market in this region is expanding at a rate 2.5 times faster than in North America.

data.title: Supra launches AutoFi: zero-block delay automation, reshaping the fairness of DeFi transactions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Supra launches AutoFi zero-block delay automation, which completely eliminates transaction execution delays, makes DeFi transactions fairer and more efficient, and brings institutional-level trading experience to all users. In the traditional DeFi system, transactions often face problems such as preemption, slippage, and execution delays. Supra's AutoFi solution ensures that transactions are completed at the moment the conditions are triggered through instant execution within the same block, without waiting or manual intervention. With the help of efficient automation mechanisms, AutoFi allows complex trading strategies to be executed accurately, allowing professional traders and ordinary users to seize market opportunities and truly realize intelligent trading. The AutoFi era has arrived, and DeFi is entering a new era of fully automatic and high-speed execution!

data.title: Czech Central Bank Skeptical About Bitcoin as Reserve Asset
data.description:
According to PANews, Jan Kubicek, a board member of the Czech National Bank (CNB), has expressed skepticism regarding the inclusion of Bitcoin in the bank's extensive reserve assets. His concerns primarily revolve around the legal uncertainties and the volatility associated with digital currencies. Earlier this year, CNB Governor Ales Michl suggested considering Bitcoin, prompting the bank to begin analyzing the potential expansion of asset categories in its reserve portfolio. However, CNB Vice Governor Eva Zamrazilova has stated that Bitcoin is not a suitable reserve asset.

In an interview on Tuesday, Kubicek remarked, "We will evaluate different asset categories, and Bitcoin is just one of them. I am quite skeptical about Bitcoin." He highlighted the legal status of Bitcoin as a concern, noting that directly holding Bitcoin would necessitate developing numerous new processes in areas such as accounting or auditing. Additionally, he mentioned volatility as another issue, making it challenging to assess market price trends. Kubicek stated, "We cannot be certain if Bitcoin's volatility in the coming years will resemble the patterns observed over the past decade, as I suspect that if more institutional investors accept Bitcoin as an investment asset, its performance will differ from what we have seen so far."

Kubicek indicated that the bank's research into new asset categories might be completed by October. This research could explore the possibility of holding international corporate bonds and investing in more targeted stock indices, such as technology, and real estate investment funds.

data.title: Trump Media executives set up SPAC company, planning to raise $179 million to acquire encryption and defense-related companies
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Three senior executives of Trump Media & Technology Group have established a new SPAC (special purpose acquisition company) Renatus Tactical Acquisition Corp I, which plans to raise at least $179 million through IPOs and private placements to acquire companies in the fields of cryptocurrency, blockchain, data security and dual-use technology.
Renatus Tactical stated in a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) that its CEO Eric Swider is now a member of the Trump Media board of directors, Trump Media CEO, President and Chairman Devin Nunes serves as chairman of the Renatus Tactical board of directors, and COO Alexander Cano served as president of the company merged with Trump Media.
It is worth noting that the Trump administration's appointments to regulatory agencies such as the SEC, the Department of Justice and the Federal Trade Commission may affect the review of related mergers and acquisitions. (Forbes)

data.title: Bakkt Appoints Akshay Naheta as Co-CEO Amid Strategic Partnership Plans
data.description:
According to PANews, Bakkt Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BKKT) has announced the appointment of Akshay Naheta as Co-CEO alongside current CEO Andy Main, effective March 21, 2025. Naheta, who brings over two decades of experience in the financial and technology sectors, is expected to enhance Bakkt's capabilities in blockchain, financial markets, and payment systems. 

Naheta's previous roles include serving as an executive at SoftBank Group, where he was involved in significant technology investments such as ARM, Auto1, and Nvidia. Following his tenure at SoftBank, he founded Distributed Technologies Research (DTR) to develop next-generation global payment infrastructure.

In addition to the leadership change, Bakkt and DTR are planning to enter into a commercial agreement. This partnership aims to integrate DTR's stablecoin-based payment technology infrastructure with Bakkt's cryptocurrency trading and brokerage technology, pending regulatory approval.

data.title: Liquidations Rising as XRP Price Pivots at the 50% RSI level
data.description:
XRP price concluded last week on a bullish recovery trend and even achieved 5 consecutive days in the green. While this confirmed that it was ready for more upside, it also highlighted risk of liquidations as leveraged positions surged in the uptrend..
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/19/liquidations-rising-as-xrp-price-pivots-at-the-50-rsi-level/
